Team Uniforms

Custom Basketball Uniforms: The Complete Team Guide

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 9, 2026 ☕ 9 min read
Home › Blog › Custom Basketball Uniforms Guide

Basketball uniforms are the most design-driven kit in team sports - the jersey is the brand, worn baggy-to-fitted across five decades of style eras, and every league from church rec to AAU showcase treats the look as part of the program's identity. This guide covers the decisions that matter: reversible vs single-side, cut and fabric, real factory costs, and the ordering timeline. All 40 designs in our basketball kit catalog follow the specs described here.

Reversible or Single-Side? Decide This First

FactorReversibleSingle-side
Best forPractice, rec leagues, camps - one purchase covers home/awaySchool, club and AAU game uniforms
FabricDouble-layer micromeshSingle-layer interlock or mesh
Design freedomTwo colorways, simpler graphicsFull sublimation freedom - gradients, patterns, city-edition looks
Cost per set$28–45$35–60

Most programs end up with both: reversibles for practice, sublimated single-side sets for games. Ordering them together in one production run saves shipping and keeps colors matched.

Fabric & Cut Specs Worth Demanding

  • Jersey: 140–180 GSM micromesh or interlock polyester - breathability beats weight in basketball; heavier is not better here.
  • Shorts: 9–11" inseam for adult, 7–9" youth; side pockets are a rec-league favorite, delete them for competitive play.
  • Cut options: classic loose, modern semi-fit, and women's grading - specify per player, not per order.
  • Trim: self-fabric or contrast binding at neck/arms - sublimated "fake trim" saves cost but real binding survives seasons of washing better.

Real 2026 Costs

PackagePer set (20-set order)
Reversible practice set$28–45
Game set (jersey + shorts, full sublimation)$35–60
Premium fashion set (gradients, city-edition concepts)$40–65
Shooting shirts / warmups$18–30

Names, numbers (front/back/shorts leg), team wordmarks and sponsor logos are all included with sublimation - the price differences above come from fabric and construction, not graphics. Every design in the catalog shows its exact range.

Ordering Timeline

  1. 8–10 weeks before season: pick a design direction from the kit catalog or send your logo; collect roster sizes with a size chart.
  2. 7 weeks out: free mockup arrives in 24–48h; iterate until the locker room agrees.
  3. 6 weeks out: sample set in 5–7 days - check jersey length on your tallest player and shorts fit on your shortest.
  4. 4–5 weeks out: production (2–4 weeks) with final roster names/numbers.
  5. 1–2 weeks out: DDP delivery in 3–7 days, duties included for US, UK, Canadian and Australian teams.

AAU & Travel Programs: The Multi-Team Play

Running multiple age groups? Order all teams in one production run with shared design and per-team color accents - it consolidates the MOQ across the program (e.g., four 10-player squads = one 40-set order), cuts per-set cost, and gives the program a unified look college scouts remember. Add matching shooting shirts and warmups in the same run for the full tunnel-walk effect.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much do custom basketball uniforms cost?

Factory-direct sublimated sets run $35-65 per jersey + shorts set at 20-set quantities; reversible practice sets $28-45. All lettering, numbering and sponsor logos are included - sublimation has no per-graphic charges.

What is the minimum order for basketball uniforms?

20 sets per design at FABRIOZA, with youth and adult sizes plus women's grading mixed freely in one order. Multi-team programs can share one design across squads to consolidate the minimum.

Are reversible basketball uniforms worth it?

For practice and rec leagues, yes - one double-layer micromesh set covers home and away. For game uniforms, single-side sublimated sets look sharper and allow unlimited design detail.

How long does a basketball uniform order take?

Free mockup in 24-48 hours, sample in 5-7 days, production 2-4 weeks, shipping 3-7 days - roughly 5-6 weeks total. Start 8-10 weeks before the season.

Can you match our school or club colors exactly?

Yes - send a Pantone code, a photo, or an existing garment and we color-match in the sublimation profile, then confirm on your physical sample before bulk production.

Get Your Team's Basketball Uniform Quote

Send your team colors and logo - free mockup in 24-48 hours, jersey + shorts sets from $35 at 20-set quantities, reversibles available.
